verbGlossary.AUTHORED BY: {target} creates and maintains {source} as its design originator
verbGlossary.ASSEMBLED BY: {source} merges discipline models into a single federated coordination model
verbGlossary.ESTIMATED BY: {source} links cost data to model elements for 5D cost estimation
verbGlossary.PRICED FROM: {source} uses model quantities to generate pricing for fabrication scope
verbGlossary.SCHEDULED BY: {source} links schedule activities to model elements for 4D simulation
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source} assigned to a specific trade {target} to resolve
verbGlossary.FACILITATED BY: {source} leads and runs BIM coordination meetings
verbGlossary.ATTENDED BY: {source} participates in BIM coordination meetings to resolve conflicts
verbGlossary.DELIVERED BY: {source} produces the final as-built model at project closeout
verbGlossary.DELIVERED TO: As-built model handed over to the owner {target} for facility operations
verbGlossary.EXTRACTED BY: {source} extracts material quantities from {target} for fabrication planning
verbGlossary.FABRICATED BY: {source} uses model-based shop drawings to manufacture building components
verbGlossary.DETAILED BY: {target} produces detailed connection and assembly drawings from {source}
verbGlossary.SURVEYED BY: {source} performs laser scanning to produce point cloud data for verification
verbGlossary.COMMISSIONED BY: {source} procures or initiates a reality capture or digital twin effort
verbGlossary.OPERATED BY: {source} uses the digital twin for ongoing facility management and monitoring
verbGlossary.CAPTURED BY: {source} takes construction photos documenting field conditions
